entry.title: Get Twidere X
entry.content:
Twidere X is a next-generation cross-social platform client.
Newly developed based on Twidere’s functions and using Twitter v2 api.
Provide support for api update and standardized display of the next generation social platform.

For beta version ,latest news and feedback, Please join telegram group to get more.
entry.summary: Twidere X is a next-generation cross-social platform client. Newly developed based on Twidere’s functions and using Twitter v2 api. Provide support for api update and standardized display of the next generation social platform.
